tickets.subject: Can't access my account - urgent!
tickets.description: I cannot login to my account. It says my credentials are invalid but I'm 100% sure I'm entering them correctly. This is critical as I have an important meeting in an hour.

tickets.subject: Invoice shows wrong amount
tickets.description: My invoice for December shows $299 but I'm on the $99/month plan. Please correct this billing error and refund the overcharge.

tickets.subject: Feature request: API webhooks
tickets.description: We need webhook support for real-time notifications. Currently we have to poll the API which is inefficient. This would be a nice enhancement for developers.

tickets.subject: Bug: Export fails silently
tickets.description: Steps to reproduce: 1) Go to Reports 2) Click Export 3) Select PDF 4) Nothing happens. Expected: PDF should download. Actual: No response, no error message.

tickets.subject: Production down - security breach detected
tickets.description: We detected unauthorized access to our production environment. Multiple users are affected. This is a critical security issue that needs immediate attention.

tickets.subject: Minor typo in settings page
tickets.description: There's a cosmetic issue - the word 'Preferences' is spelled as 'Preferances' in the settings menu. Not urgent, just something I noticed.

tickets.subject: 2FA codes not arriving
tickets.description: I'm not receiving the two-factor authentication codes via SMS. I've waited over 30 minutes. My phone number is correct and I have good signal.

tickets.subject: Request refund for unused months
tickets.description: I cancelled my annual subscription 3 months in. Would like a refund for the remaining 9 months as per your refund policy.

tickets.subject: App crashes when offline
tickets.description: The mobile app crashes immediately when there's no internet connection. It should gracefully handle offline mode or at least show an error message instead of crashing.

tickets.subject: Suggestion: Dark mode theme
tickets.description: Would love to see a dark mode option. Working late at night with the bright interface causes eye strain. This would be a great enhancement.

tickets.subject: Password reset link expired instantly
tickets.description: I requested a password reset and clicked the link within 30 seconds. It says the link has expired. This is blocking me from accessing my account.

tickets.subject: Double charged for subscription
tickets.description: I was charged twice on December 1st - $49.99 each time. Please refund the duplicate charge as soon as possible.

tickets.subject: Bug: Charts show wrong data
tickets.description: The analytics dashboard charts are showing data from the wrong date range. Selecting 'Last 7 days' shows data from last month instead.

tickets.subject: Need to upgrade plan ASAP
tickets.description: We've exceeded our current plan limits and need to upgrade immediately. Our business depends on this service. Please help expedite the upgrade process.

tickets.subject: Feature: Scheduled reports
tickets.description: It would be really useful to schedule reports to be generated and emailed automatically on a weekly/monthly basis.

tickets.subject: Cannot upload files larger than 1MB
tickets.description: File uploads are failing for any file over 1MB. The error says 'File too large' but your docs say 10MB is the limit. Please fix this technical issue.

tickets.subject: Account permissions incorrect
tickets.description: I was supposed to have admin access but I can only see regular user options. My supervisor confirmed I should have elevated permissions.

tickets.subject: Questions about enterprise pricing
tickets.description: We're considering the enterprise plan for our company of 500+ employees. Can you provide more details about volume discounts and custom pricing?

tickets.subject: Bug: Memory leak in dashboard
tickets.description: The dashboard causes browser memory usage to grow continuously. After leaving it open for a few hours, Chrome uses over 4GB RAM and becomes unresponsive.

tickets.subject: Request to change account email
tickets.description: I need to change my account email from my personal to my work email. The change email option in settings doesn't work - button is disabled.
